# Alberto Farah | Silhouette Agency OS

An elite software engineering and AI agency specializing in custom SaaS development, Autonomous AI Agents, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and Multi-Agent Swarms. Built on premium architectural principles with high-fidelity user experiences.

## Services
- **AI Swarms & Autonomy**: Custom multi-agent systems designed for complex operational pipelines.
- **Tailored SaaS Architecture**: Multi-tenant, secure, high-performance web applications.
- **Enterprise Cognitive Systems**: Semantic search, vector memory databases, and RAG search.

## Featured Projects
- **Silhouette Agency OS**: An autonomous, local-first operating system for creative agencies utilizing local LLMs (via Ollama) and hybrid 4-tier vector memory.
- **Contract Generator SaaS**: An automated SaaS utility generating legally compliant agreements dynamically (`cg.unityiris.com`).

## Contact
- **Website**: https://albertofarah.com
- **Email**: alberto.farah.b@gmail.com
